Photo Credits: Front cover: Filip Fuxa/Dreamstimecom; back cover: @ Aleksandr Volkovl Dreamstime.com; title page: @ Takashi Shinkai/Minden Pictures; page 3: Arndt/Minden Pictures; page 4: @ Cathy Keifer/Dreamstimecom; page 5: Piotr Naskrecki/Minden Pictures; page 6: @ Tommy Schultz/Dreamstimecom; page 7: @ Igor SiwanowiczBarcroft Media/Landov; page 8: @ Andrey Davidenkol Dreamstimecom; page 9: @ Httin/Dreamstimecom; page IO: @ Norbert Wul Science Faction/Corbis Note to teachers: In this book, we use "bug" to mean insect," since most of our readers consider all insects to be bugs. In fact; a is a specific type of insect within the arthropod group that includes aphids, cicadas, and stinkbugs True bugs would not include all the insects in this book.
